notes: List assumes the dual-wield build — two Siegecrafter's Forge Hammers with Fallen Crusader main hand and Razorice off hand. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
